title: Industry Sectors
description: Primary industry sectors and economic drivers

blocks.title: Industry Sectors
blocks.subtitle: Five pillars of economic development
blocks.content: Specialized industrial clusters designed to attract global investment

blocks.title: Economic Diversification
blocks.content: KWIN City targets five high-growth sectors with significant employment and investment potential. Each sector is supported by dedicated infrastructure, workforce development, and innovation support.

blocks.title: Investment Opportunity
blocks.content: With a combined target of ₹40,000 crore investment and 100,000+ jobs, KWIN City offers significant opportunities for private sector participation and industrial growth.
